title: lithocarpus bidoupensis
intro: Lithocarpus bidoupensis, also known as Bidoup oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to Vietnam. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bark, leaves, and seeds. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus bidoupensis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to various health benefits such as reducing fever, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
